name: rls-security
description: Generate production-grade Supabase PostgreSQL schemas with strict Row Level Security for multi-tenant SaaS.

interface.longDescription: Designs adversarially-hardened Supabase schemas with strict tenant isolation, least-privilege grants, and comprehensive RLS policy test cases.
defaultPrompt: Generate strict Supabase RLS schema for my SaaS
Audit my existing RLS policies for tenant breakout risk
Add SQL tests for anon/authenticated/service_role access
